name: Search
description: Search for movies and TV shows via TMDB. Returns results with availability status so you know if something is already available, pending, or not yet requested. Use the returned id (TMDB ID) and mediaType when calling seerr_request.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["query"],"properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search terms — movie or TV show title"},"page":{"type":"integer","description":"Result page number (default 1)","minimum":1}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Request media
description: Request a movie or TV show. Use seerr_search first to get the TMDB id and mediaType. For TV shows, optionally specify which seasons to request — if omitted all seasons are requested. Movies and approved TV requests are automatically sent to Radarr and Sonarr respectively.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["mediaId","mediaType"],"properties":{"mediaId":{"type":"integer","description":"TMDB ID from seerr_search"},"mediaType":{"type":"string","enum":["movie","tv"],"description":"Media type"},"seasons":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer"},"description":"Season numbers to request (TV only — omit to request all seasons)"},"is4k":{"type":"boolean","description":"Request 4K quality (default false)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get requests
description: List media requests and their current status. Use filter to narrow by state. Useful for checking if a request was approved, is downloading, or is already available.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"filter":{"type":"string","enum":["all","pending","approved","processing","available","failed"],"description":"Filter by request status (default: all)"},"mediaType":{"type":"string","enum":["movie","tv"],"description":"Filter by media type (omit for both)"},"take":{"type":"integer","description":"Number of results to return (default 20)","minimum":1,"maximum":100}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Request count
description: Get a quick summary of how many requests are in each state: pending approval, approved and downloading, already available, or failed.

name: Build request
Format response
Get TV details
description: Get detailed information about a TV show including per-season availability. Use this to check if specific seasons are already in the library before requesting. Requires the TMDB ID from seerr_search.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["tmdbId"],"properties":{"tmdbId":{"type":"integer","description":"TMDB ID of the TV show (from seerr_search)"}}}

name: Build request
Format response
Get movie details
description: Get detailed information about a movie including availability status, runtime and release date. Requires the TMDB ID from seerr_search.

name: Build request
Format response
Get season episodes
description: Get the episode list for a specific season of a TV show, including episode numbers, titles and air dates. Use seerr_get_tv first to see which seasons exist and their overall availability, then call this to drill into a specific season.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["tmdbId","seasonNumber"],"properties":{"tmdbId":{"type":"integer","description":"TMDB ID of the TV show (from seerr_search)"},"seasonNumber":{"type":"integer","description":"Season number (1, 2, 3…)","minimum":1}}}

name: Build request
Format response
